packageRules.description: Minimum Release Age cannot be enforced for package replacements on non-npm ecosystems
prBodyNotes: ⚠️ Renovate's replacement flow does not currently wire in release-age metadata (renovatebot/renovate#39400). Manually validate the Minimum Release Age for the replacement package.

packageRules.description: Minimum Release Age cannot be enforced for pin updates on non-npm ecosystems
prBodyNotes: ⚠️ Renovate's pin flow does not currently wire in release-age metadata (renovatebot/renovate#40288). Manually validate the Minimum Release Age for the pinned version.
